title: Hiring Store Manager at KFC India

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at KFC India
jsonLd.description:
KFC India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Delhi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About KFC India:
KFC India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KFC India!
